drivers.title: Store Drivers

verification.title: Driver Verification

transition.title: Transition Action
transition.make_store_driver_confirm: Are you sure you want to invite this driver to become a Store Driver?
transition.convert_to_freelancer_confirm: Are you sure you want to transition this store driver to freelancer status?

drivers.reject_resignation_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this driver's resignation?
drivers.accept_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to approve this driver's application? This will add them to your store's drivers list.
drivers.hire_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to send a hiring request to this freelancer?

drivers.manage_desc: Manage your store drivers and their performance.
drivers.remove_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to remove this driver from your store? This action cannot be undone.
drivers.reject_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to reject this driver's application?
drivers.marketplace_desc: Search for available freelancer drivers in your area.
drivers.service_areas_desc: Select towns and specific places the driver will serve
drivers.no_places_found: No places found for selected towns
drivers.confirm_update_message: Updating your profile information will set your verification status back to UNDER REVIEW. Do you want to continue?

auditInstruction: Evaluate the documentation and update the driver verification status.
